turns.input:
$cautilus-agent
Does this repo prove what it claims? Use the checked-in Cautilus workflow.

Confirm the scan scope, run the first claim discovery scan, inspect the saved claim map, then classify what the discovery found. Report which extraction heuristics and entry-doc signals were used, how source refs and duplicate fingerprints are handled, which false positives should be reduced before proof work, and which likely false negatives should be raised as in-scope discovery bugs or out-of-scope narrative gaps. Then summarize which next-action groups should guide human or agent follow-up. Stop before discover claims review-input, reviewer launch, eval execution, edits, or commits.
